The '''MOD-17''' was a container [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] produced by [[Loronar Corporation/Legends|Loronar Corporation]]. It measured five hundred and fifty [[Meter/Legends|meters]] in length.<ref name="HotI" />

The MOD-17 freighter was split into four separate modular cargo sections, each of which could be modified to accommodate a wide variety of cargoes—the interior environment could be altered, for example, to become [[Water/Legends|aquatic]] or gaseous habitats, or simply left as a basic, [[Deflector shield/Legends|shielded]] space. A standard MOD-17 freighter had interior capacity for 200,000 [[Metric ton/Legends|metric tons]] of cargo, and could transport up to thirty passengers. It required a crew of fifty, and had a built-in [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]] generator.<ref name="HotI" />

==Appearances==
*{{GamerCite|8|Hive of the Infidel}} {{1st}}
